theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

verdicts.name: Super Micro
verdicts.note: AI 서버 OEM, NVDA 출하 직접 지표
verdicts.label: ACCUMULATE

narrative.summary: Super Micro: 정량 종합 69점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 57 / 중기 68 / 장기 78. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 과열
overheat.guidance: 조정(10~15% 하락) 기다리는 게 안전. 지금은 관망.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 6.9% → 2-ATR 손절폭 13.7%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 일봉 200MA, Value Area High. 현재가 대비 +23.5% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $35.89 아래 손절가 $30.93 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: SpaceX, Other Mega IPOs Denied Fast Index Entry by S&P
top_news.summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices will keep its existing eligibility requirements for main benchmarks like the S&P 500 Index, rejecting proposals that would have made it faster for mega-cap companies such as Elon Musk’s SpaceX to gain rapid entry into the benchmark after going public.

top_news.title: Cracks Emerge in Kospi’s 105% Rally as Breadth Concerns Mount
top_news.summary: South Korea’s $4.9 trillion stock market is starting to flash signs of strain after a world-beating rally.

top_news.title: Wall Street Sees SpaceX’s AI Revenue 100 Times Higher by 2030
top_news.summary: Research analysts across Wall Street are telling would-be SpaceX IPO buyers that they’re modeling for the company’s artificial intelligence division to see 100 times revenue growth at the end of the decade, to help justify a targeted $1.8 trillion valuation.

top_news.title: Music Producer Hit-Boy on AI Democratizing Creativity
top_news.summary: Hit-Boy, Grammy-Winning Artist & Producer discusses AI tools, music production and creative experimentation with Bloomberg’s Emily Chang and Tom Giles at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: World Labs' Fei-Fei Li on Creating Large World Models
top_news.summary: Fei-Fei Li, Co-Founder & CEO at World Labs discusses spatial intelligence, large world models and real-world AI applications with Bloomberg’s Emily Chang at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Asian Stocks Poised to Edge Lower, Oil Steadies: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Stocks in Asia were set to edge lower on Friday as investors grappled with a pullback in artificial-intelligence shares and hopes of a diplomatic resolution to tensions in the Middle East.

top_news.title: Mythos AI Model Finds Hundreds of Vulnerabilities in Firefox
top_news.summary: Raffi Krikorian, chief technology officer at Mozilla, said that it's important identify and start to close a bunch of critical vulnerabilities to mitigate risks as AI dependence builds up. Krikorian said that a major consideration is making sure models are on your side and consumers are not living in 'someone else's intelligence.' (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: US-Iran Talks Progress Stalls After Hezbollah Rejects Truce
top_news.summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia rejected on Thursday a US-brokered truce in Lebanon.

top_news.title: AI, Xerox Debt and Canada’s ‘Lost Status’ at Sohn Montreal
top_news.summary: Hedge fund managers and other investors are gathered at a conference in Montreal to pitch the next big thing, and everything from artificial intelligence, biotech and gold mining was on the table Thursday.

top_news.title: Dow Average Hits Peak as Old-School Stocks Beat AI: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Wall Street drove a rotation out of chipmakers into several other industries that tend to benefit from a resilient economy after Broadcom Inc.’s underwhelming outlook tested the artificial-intelligence trade.
